eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Juab, UT; at 4:22 PM on JUN 20, 2026 Effective until 4:22 PM JUN 21, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: JUAB CO EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT- Iron Fire Town of Eureka in READY Status. Juab County Emergency Management has placed the town of Eureka in READY status due to the Iron Fire. READY status means a wildfire is active in the area and conditions could change. This means you should prepare now so you can leave quickly if the situation worsens. Gather medications, documents, and a go-kit. Ready your family, pets, and vehicle to leave quickly. Monitor your phone, local TV, and radio for updates. If you feel unsafe, you can leave at any time.
